    Index

    A C D G H L M R U 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

    A

    actionPerformed(ActionEvent) - Method in class ui.GUI
    Handles button clicks and UI navigation logic.

    C

    CashierMain() - Method in class ui.CashierPanel
    Builds and displays the main cashier interface.
    CashierPanel - Class in ui
    Provides the Point of Sale (POS) user interface for cashiers to process orders.
    CashierPanel(JFrame, DatabaseManager, GUI, ReportsPanel) - Constructor for class ui.CashierPanel
    Constructs a new CashierPanel with necessary dependencies.
    Checkout() - Method in class ui.CashierPanel
    Deprecated.
    Use CashierPanel.handleCheckout() instead for a more robust implementation with proper error logging and state clearing.
    conn - Variable in class database.DatabaseManager
    The active connection to the database.

    D

    database - package database
     
    DatabaseManager - Class in database
    Manages the connection and low-level operations for the PostgreSQL database.
    DatabaseManager() - Constructor for class database.DatabaseManager
    Initializes the DatabaseManager and attempts to establish a connection.

    G

    GUI - Class in ui
    Graphical user interface for the drink ordering and management system.
    GUI() - Constructor for class ui.GUI
     

    H

    handleAddItem(String) - Method in class ui.CashierPanel
    Adds a specific menu item to the current order based on a UI action command.
    handleCheckout() - Method in class ui.CashierPanel
    Finalizes the current transaction.
    handleDeleteItem(String) - Method in class ui.CashierPanel
    Removes a drink from the current order and updates the running total.

    L

    lastZReportDate - Static variable in class ui.GUI
    Tracks the date of the last generated Z-Report for end-of-day processing.

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class ui.GUI
    Entry point of the application.
    MainMenu() - Method in class ui.GUI
     
    ManagerEmployeesPage() - Method in class ui.manager.ManagerPanel
    Renders the Employee Management page.
    ManagerInventoryPage() - Method in class ui.manager.ManagerPanel
    Renders the Inventory Management page.
    ManagerMain() - Method in class ui.manager.ManagerPanel
    Renders the Manager Dashboard.
    ManagerMenuPage() - Method in class ui.manager.ManagerPanel
    Renders the Manager Dashboard.
    ManagerPanel - Class in ui.manager
    The administrative control center for the system.
    ManagerPanel(JFrame, DatabaseManager, GUI) - Constructor for class ui.manager.ManagerPanel
    Constructs a ManagerPanel with necessary dependencies.
    ManagerReportsPage() - Method in class ui.manager.ReportsPanel
    Builds the Reports user interface.

    R

    ReloadMenuItems() - Method in class ui.CashierPanel
    Fetches all available items from the 'MenuItems' table in the database.
    ReportsPanel - Class in ui.manager
    Handles the generation and display of business intelligence reports.
    ReportsPanel(JFrame, DatabaseManager, GUI, ManagerPanel) - Constructor for class ui.manager.ReportsPanel
    Constructs the ReportsPanel with required database and UI references.
    ResetFrame() - Static method in class ui.GUI
    Clears all components from the main application frame.
    runPreparedQueryIntoTable(JFrame, String, DefaultTableModel, Object...) - Method in class database.DatabaseManager
    Executes a parameterized SQL query to prevent SQL injection and updates a JTable model.
    runQueryIntoTable(JFrame, String, DefaultTableModel) - Method in class database.DatabaseManager
    Executes a standard SQL SELECT query and populates a JTable model with the results.
    runZReport(LocalDate, DefaultTableModel) - Method in class ui.manager.ReportsPanel
    Generates a "Z-Report" which finalizes the day's sales and resets totals.

    U

    ui - package ui
     
    ui.manager - package ui.manager
     
    updateReportTotalsForOrder(float, Timestamp) - Method in class ui.manager.ReportsPanel
    Updates the real-time aggregation tables whenever an order is completed.
